flags.label: In-state tuition
flags.summary: In-state tuition at University of St Thomas rose 13% between 2021 and 2024 ($48.3k → $54.4k).

flags.label: Out-of-state tuition
flags.summary: Out-of-state tuition at University of St Thomas rose 13% between 2021 and 2024 ($48.3k → $54.4k).

flags.label: 3-year cohort default rate
flags.summary: 3-year cohort default rate at University of St Thomas fell 100% between 2021 and 2024 (0.9% → 0.0%).

flags.label: Private nonprofit bachelor's-predominant peer
flags.summary: 10-year earnings at University of St Thomas are 24% above the private nonprofit bachelor's-predominant peer median ($73.7k vs $59.6k).
